summary: Static type checking (pyright and mypy) failed due to many reported missing or non-exported attributes on pyarrow modules, causing pre-commit hooks to fail.
root_cause: pyright and mypy reported numerous attribute/export issues for pyarrow (e.g. attributes in pyarrow.compute, pyarrow.fs, and pyarrow missing or not exported), causing the type-checking hooks to fail.

evidence.quote: /home/runner/work/pandas/pandas/pandas/core/arrays/arrow/accessors.py:319:14 - error: "Expression" is not exported from module "pyarrow.compute" (reportPrivateImportUsage)
evidence.reason: pyright reports 'Expression' is not exported from pyarrow.compute, indicating pyright sees missing exports on pyarrow.compute

evidence.quote: pandas/compat/pyarrow.py:76: error: Module has no attribute "is_null"  [attr-defined]
evidence.reason: mypy reports pyarrow.compute (accessed in pandas/compat/pyarrow.py) has no attribute 'is_null', showing mypy cannot find expected attributes on pyarrow
mypy reports many missing string-related attributes in pyarrow.compute used in pandas core array string mixins

evidence.quote: error: not checking stubs due to mypy build errors:
evidence.reason: stubtest aborted because mypy build errors (type errors) occurred, indicating the type-check failures prevented further stub checks

evidence.quote: Found 279 errors in 9 files (checked 1458 source files)
evidence.reason: mypy reports a large number of type errors across files, confirming widespread type-check failures

suggested_fix: Provide proper type information for pyarrow (so type-checkers see the attributes used) or adjust type-checker configuration: e.g., add/enable correct pyarrow typings or stubs, update the pyarrow version/stubs used by the CI environment, or narrow/ignore pyarrow-related checks in mypy/pyright until typing support for the used pyarrow API is available.
